/cwe/weakness/1092.Name: Use of Same Invokable Control Element in Multiple Architectural Layers
/cwe/weakness/1092.Description:
The product uses the same control element across multiple
					architectural layers.
/cwe/weakness/1092.ExtendedDescription: This issue makes it more difficult to understand and maintain the product, which indirectly affects security by making it more difficult or time-consuming to find and/or fix vulnerabilities. It also might make it easier to introduce vulnerabilities.
